assessor_1_raw: Multimodal pathology classification: design is methodologically sound. Site-and-time stratified split is particularly rigorous. Macro-F1 is appropriate for multiclass with rare subtypes. Label leakage audit is essential and well-specified. Image-only baseline isolates text contribution. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Strong clinical AI experiment design. The dual generalization test (temporal + institutional) is more rigorous than most published clinical AI studies. Per-class metrics, ECE, and PPV/NPV with CIs cover clinical deployment needs. Templated reporting analysis is an important confound check. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Well-designed multimodal pathology study. The fusion architecture grid search is appropriate. Class imbalance handled with stratified splits and weighted loss. Sensitivity analysis excluding low-confidence annotations is an excellent robustness check. Scope is honest about limitations. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw: Unanimous defense_wins from all three assessors.
